# textureFlipped()

**Instance Method**

Returns whether or not the contents of the texture are flipped vertically.

## Declaration

```swift
func textureFlipped() -> Bool
```

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the contents of the texture are flipped (upside-down); [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] otherwise.

## Getting Texture Information

- **texturePixelsWide()**: Returns the width of the texture representation.
- **texturePixelsHigh()**: Returns the height of the texture representation.
- **textureTarget()**: Returns the texture target.
- **textureName()**: Returns the texture name.
- **textureColorSpace()**: Returns the color space of the texture representation.
- **textureMatrix()**: Returns a texture matrix.
